title: BenchmarkRow
description: One CPT's fair-price data. Produced by Jay's pipeline (data/pipeline → data/seed → benchmarks table); consumed by the flag engine, dossier builder, get_benchmark tool, and report. FROZEN at H2.

medicare_rate.description: CMS fee-schedule rate, locality-adjusted (real pipeline data)

fh_estimate.description: FAIR Health approximation — MUST render as 'estimated' in all UI (paywalled source)

mrf_cash.description: Hospital's own posted discounted cash price (real MRF data)
